Ready for a Confident Smile with Invisalign?

Invisalign® is an orthodontic treatment process using customized clear, thin plastic trays to align and straighten teeth without the need for metal braces.

We’re all about Digital Dentistry! No more goopy impressions; we take digital video scans of your mouth to create digital 3D models of your teeth. Customized Invisalign treamtent can start as early as within 2 weeks! Get your aligners after a single data collection appointment!

Book my Free Invisalign Consult →

Shopping around for Invisalign Treatment? You’re not alone! We often get this question! Many other dental clinics charge between $5,500 and $8,000 for orthodontic treatment. At Harvest Dental Care, we provide the Invisalign Comprehensive Package, the highest quality treatment option, for only $4,479. We don’t use cheaper brand alternative clear aligner systems. We have set our prices to make them affordable for most of our patients by being efficient with your teeth alignment treatment!

Invisalign for only $4,479?

Payment plans available!

Payment Options →

Invisalign & Orthodontic Treatments

  • Clear Aligners

    Align your teeth with a set of clear aligners that gradually shift them into the right position.

  • Clear Retainers

    Use a removable appliance to prevent your teeth from shifting, regardless of past orthodontic treatment.

  • Fixed Retainers

    Keep your teeth in place by adding a wire behind your front teeth, whether you have had orthodontic treatment or not.

Invisalign can treat most Teens & Adults until age 65

Benefits of Invisalign Teeth Alignment

  • Photo Ready

    Whether in front of the camera or not, let your smile be your brand by being ready to smile anytime!

  • Dental Health

    Aligned teeth are easier to clean (better flossing and brushing). Aligned teeth are less likely to chip or fracture.

  • Confidence

    Avoid being self-conscious of your smile by deliberately hiding your teeth when you talk or smile with others.

At Harvest Dental Care, we include the following with your treatment to get the smile you always wanted.

✓ Clear Aligner Trays - Genuine Invisalign Treatment Aligners
✓ Teeth Whitening Included - Take-home Philips Zoom! Teeth Whitening
✓ Treatment Accelerator Tools - Munchies and Tray Removal
✓ Invisalign Virtual Care - At home aligner monitoring program
✓ Final Retainers Included - One upper and lower retainer
✓ Invisalign Clinic Visits - Inital and refinement trays included

Invisalign Care Program Features

Flexible Invisalign Payment Plans in 2026

  • 6 Month Plan

    $579/month x 6 payments
    $1,000 Down Payment

    + All Credit Cards Accepted
    + No Application Form
    + No Credit Check
    + In-Office Financing

    Make six payments and avoid dealing with other lenders like banks or credit companies.

  • 12 Month Plan

    $298/month x 12 payments
    $1,000 Down Payment

    + All Credit Cards Accepted
    + No Application Form
    + No Credit Check
    + In-Office Financing

    This option also avoids excessive interest rates than you can manage over a year.

  • $149/month Plan

    Up to 48 Months Term
    No Down Payment Plan

    + Competitive Interest Rates
    + Will not affect Credit Score
    + Quick Prequalifying
    + iFinance Canada, Inc.

    Apply Now: iFinance Canada →

3 Steps to Start Invisalign!

Step 1. Virtual Video Consultation (Free)

When we say free, we mean free. A free 15 minute video consultation with our Invisalign Dentist to discuss your dental concerns. Book Free Consult →

Step 2. In-Person Data Collection

At the Data Collection appointment we take a Dental Scan (a video 3D model of your teeth) and Photos to develop a plan.

NOTE: A $300 fully refundable deposit is requested to book for Data Collection.

Step 3. Invisalign Fitting

We can insert your custom aligners in 2-3 weeks after Data Collection (Step 2). We show you how to use the aligners and the treatment process.

Invisalign with Dr. Osman Anwar

Dr. Osman Anwar enjoys solving crooked smiles! He also likes solving puzzles! Learn about the Invisalign process and how to get straight teeth in a shorter period of time with this short cartoon video.

As a Multidisciplinary General Dentist with a Special Interest in Orthodontics, we have helped many people improve their smiles through Invisalign, Teeth Whitening, Veneers, Bonding and Facial Esthetics. Dr. Osman Anwar provides orthodontic and dental services as a General Dentist.

Will my Insurance pay for Invisalign?

Read more →

Platinum Invisalign Provider

We work hard to complete Invisalign cases for our patients in Calgary and Cochrane. Our personalized treatment plans set us apart. You will see the same dentist at each visit, ensuring consistent care. Your smile is unique, and so is your treatment. As a 2024 Invisalign Platinum Provider, we strive to provide the best care possible. We are members of the American Academy of Clear Aligners (AACA) and regularly pursue Invisalign continuing education, dedicating hundreds of hours to improve your smile.

Our Memberships & Associations

Have a question about Invisalign?

Send us a message and we will reply back! Get clarity about Invisalign treatmnet with a few questions. We never share your personal information with anyone.

  • Full service dentistry refers to a comprehensive approach that encompasses a wide range of dental services under one location. This includes preventive care such as cleanings and check-ups, restorative procedures like fillings and crowns, and more special interest treatments like orthodontics and oral surgery. By offering a complete array of dental services, our full-service approach aims to address all aspects of oral health and provide patients with convenient and holistic dental care.

    Multi-disciplinary dental treatment encompasses a wide range of procedures and services that involve various specialties within the field of dentistry. These specialties may include areas such as orthodontics, periodontics, endodontics, and prosthodontics, each focusing on different aspects of oral health and care.
